カードの効果.発動効果: Choose 1 of your [Grass] Pokémon in play. Put a random [Grass] Pokémon from your deck that evolves from that Pokémon onto that Pokémon to evolve it. You can’t use this card during your first turn or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.
カードの効果.追加ルール: You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.
